nameMeanings.name: Rodington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Reddington
meanings: English: probably a habitational name from Rettendon (Essex), from an uncertain first element + Old English dūn ‘hill’.
Irish (Mayo): from an Anglicized form of Ó Roideacháin or Ó Rodacháin; see Roddy 2.

nameMeanings.name: Richardus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Richard , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. Compare Rickards .
German: patronymic from the personal name   Richard  .

variants.name: Richard
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Richardus II Rodington was born in Ruddington, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Michael Rodington. He had at least 1 son with Margareta. He died in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Richardus II Rodington est né à Ruddington, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Michael Rodington. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Margareta. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Richardus II Rodington wurde in Ruddington, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Michael Rodington geboren. Er hatte mit Margareta mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Richardus II Rodington è nato il nel Ruddington, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Michael Rodington. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Margareta. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Richardus II RodingtonはイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアルッドイントンでMichael Rodingtonの息子として生まれた。彼はMargaretaとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richardus II Rodington(은)는 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 루딩턴에서 Michael Rodington의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Margareta(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richardus II Rodington nasceu em Ruddington, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Michael Rodington. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Margareta. Ele faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Richardus II Rodington родился в местности руддингтон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали Michael Rodington. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Margareta. Он умер в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Richardus II Rodington nació en Ruddington, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de Michael Rodington. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Margareta. Murió en su pueblo.
